semantic.role: Configuration manifest for the ArchSpine mirror system, tracking indexed files and synchronization state.
responsibilities: File index tracking and hash verification
Sync state management (mode, timestamps, completion flags)
invariants: Each file entry must have a unique contentHash matching the source file
sourceExists must accurately reflect actual filesystem state
indexedUnitCount must equal the number of file entries in the files block
reverseIndexComplete must be true before reverse lookups are considered reliable

English.role: Configuration manifest for the ArchSpine mirror system, tracking indexed files and synchronization state.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the expected structure version for parsing. A mismatch may cause the system to reject the file or behave unpredictably.
parameter_definitions.generatorVersion: Records the tool that generated this manifest; important for debugging compatibility issues.
parameter_definitions.createdAt / updatedAt: Timestamps indicating when the manifest was created and last modified, used to detect stale configurations.
parameter_definitions.sync.lastSyncAt: Timestamp of the last full or partial synchronization; used to determine if cached data is fresh.
parameter_definitions.sync.lastSyncMode: Either 'full' or 'incremental' – a full sync ensures all entries are verified, while incremental may miss changes.
parameter_definitions.sync.reverseIndexComplete: When false, reverse lookups (e.g., 'find files containing this term') are unavailable or incomplete; may break features relying on reverse indexing.
parameter_definitions.sync.indexedUnitCount: Number of units (typically files) that have been indexed. Must match the count of file keys for consistency.
parameter_definitions.files.<path>.contentHash: SHA-256 hash of the file content. Used to detect modifications; any mismatch indicates data drift and potential corruption.
parameter_definitions.files.<path>.fileKind: Classifies the file (e.g., 'source'), affecting how it is processed by downstream tools.
parameter_definitions.files.<path>.lastIndexedAt: Timestamp of last indexing of that specific file; older entries may cause stale search results.
parameter_definitions.files.<path>.docs: Array of documentation metadata extracted from the file; empty if not yet parsed.
parameter_definitions.files.<path>.sourceExists: Boolean flag indicating if the file still exists on disk. If false but the entry remains, the index may be stale and cause errors when accessing the file.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file is critical for the internal consistency of the ArchSpine mirror environment. The most sensitive parameters are `reverseIndexComplete` (if false, many query features degrade) and `sourceExists` flags (false positives can cause runtime errors when attempting to read missing files). Hash mismatches between `contentHash` and actual file content indicate silent data corruption. The `indexedUnitCount` must be manually verified against the actual file list to avoid index drift. Correct synchronization mode and timestamps ensure that downstream consumers operate on up-to-date data. Any manual edits to this file risk breaking the synchronization pipeline.
